0.text: Mosaic attenuation pattern in both lungs

1.text: Irregularly contoured density with punctate calcification, approximately 7x4 mm, at the apex of the right lung

2.text: Smoothly contoured nodule, 4.5 mm, at the apex of the right lung

3.text: 6 mm low-density nodule in the middle lobe of the right lung

4.text: 3.5 mm nodule in the apicoposterior segment of the left upper lobe
